case_title: KIM DAVIS-LEVY VS. HAO HAI GONG

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY DAVIS-LEVY, KIM AS TO DEFENDANT GONG, HAO HAI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-04-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DAVIS-LEVY, KIM ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT GONG, HAO HAI
ORDER ON DEFENDANT'S REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-04-2011; REQUEST IS GRANTED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-04-2011 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JUL-06-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $NONE) SERVED APR-05-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GONG, HAO HAI
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LEVINE. FILED BY DAVIS-LEVY, KIM GONG, HAO HAI

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-06-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-06-2011 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LEVINE. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOTHING REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-06-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DAVIS-LEVY, KIM IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GONG, HAO HAI **PLAINTIFF DID NOT MAKE OUT CLAIM THAT SECURITY DEPOSIT FUNDS WERE IMPROPERLY WITHHELD.** STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-03-2012 ORDERED DESTROYED
